# controlPlane.execution.resume

Resume a paused execution-lane run.

## Metadata

- **Type**: operation (command)
- **Version**: 1.0.0
- **Tags**: execution, lane
- **File**: `packages/libs/contracts-spec/src/control-plane/commands/controlPlaneExecutionResume.command.ts`

## Goal

Return a lane to active execution after operator intervention.

## Context

Used when paused work is allowed to continue.
